arts.ttl: Fulham lose longest penalty shootout in League Cup history as Premier League side crash out to Championship club Preston in third round after THIRTY-ONE spot-kicks
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL AT DEEPDALE: Championship Preston North End knocked out Fulham last night after the longest penalty shoot-out in League Cup history.

arts.ttl: Paul Heckingbottom was desperate for Preston to win marathon penalty shoot-out
arts.sum: After a 1-1 draw in normal time, Timothy Castagne ballooned over and Ryan Ledson sent Steven Benda the wrong way.

arts.ttl: See it to believe it! Fulham, Preston take 34 penalties in agonising shootout!
arts.sum: Preston and Fulham set a record as they played out the longest penalty shootout in League Cup history.

arts.ttl: Liverpool record smashed as Preston cause Premier League shock
arts.sum: Liverpool have been knocked off their perch by Preston North End after the Championship club set a new penalty shootout record. The Lilywhites entertained Premier League side Fulham in the third round of the League Cup on Tuesday night and took a surprise lead before the half through Ryan Ledson. arts.ttl: Preston 1-1 Fulham (16-15 on pens... yes, you read that correctly)
arts.sum: Highlights from the third round of the Carabao Cup between Preston North End and Fulham.

arts.ttl: Preston win epic THIRTY-FOUR penalty shoot-out to edge Fulham
arts.sum: Ryan Ledson scored the winning penalty as Preston won an incredible shoot-out 16-15 to dump Fulham out of the Carabao Cup.

arts.ttl: Ryan Ledson holds his nerve as Preston win marathon penalty shoot-out
arts.sum: At 15-15, Timothy Castagne ballooned over and Ledson sent Steven Benda the wrong way to the delight of the Deepdale faithful.

arts.ttl: Danny Ings makes West Ham exit decision after late Fulham goal
arts.sum: Danny Ings was West Ham’s saviour at the weekend, pouncing on a loose ball to fire home an injury-time equaliser at Fulham to deny the Cottagers a deserved home win. The goal can be considered a collectors item, given that it was only his fifth in 54 Hammers appearances per transfermarkt.
